description_long: This object consists of four cylindrical metal barrels, each with a dark, weathered surface and visible horizontal ridges around their midsections. Two of the barrels have partially attached, slightly ajar lids, while the other two are open at the top, revealing empty interiors. The barrels exhibit a matte black finish with subtle signs of wear and possible rust, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The tops are flat, and the barrels are of uniform height and diameter, typical of industrial or utility containers. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the barrels appear robust and heavy-duty. The overall appearance suggests these barrels are used for storage or waste collection in urban or industrial environments.
description: A group of four weathered, black metal barrels with flat tops, two featuring partially open lids and two open. The barrels have horizontal ridges and a matte, worn finish, suitable for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: Two barrels with partially open lids are visible in the foreground, while two open barrels are in the background, showing the interior.
description_view_1: All four barrels are visible, with the open tops of the barrels more prominent and the lids less visible from this angle.
description_view_2: The barrels with lids are positioned at the back, making the open barrels in the front more prominent and showing the flat tops clearly.
description_view_3: The open barrels are at the back, and the barrels with partially open lids are in the foreground, emphasizing the lid shapes.
